destinations.evidence: Scheduled compact codec serializes/deserializes input, origin_tx, call_id, index, initial_block, frequency, ttl, caller, commitment_tx, settlement_tx, and spc_calls.
Regular scheduled execution transactions initialize async linkage hashes/SPC calls as None.

equivalence_argument: Mapped in the port: compact codecs preserve scheduled metadata and regular scheduled tx construction starts linkage fields as None.
rationale: The metadata-preservation candidates are cumulative codec fixes. Current storage-codec evidence shows origin_tx, commitment/settlement hashes, caller, timing fields, and spc_calls are encoded/decoded rather than reset.
statement: Compact storage encoding for scheduled transactions preserves input calldata, origin_tx, call_id, index, initial_block/start metadata, frequency, caller, commitment_tx, settlement_tx, and SPC calls; regular scheduled transactions created for ordinary calls initialize commitment_tx and settlement_tx as None.
suggested_falsification_tests: Compact round-trip a scheduled tx with non-empty SPC calls and linkage hashes; assert equality.
Create normal scheduled execution tx and assert commitment_tx/settlement_tx/spc_calls are None.
summary: Scheduled storage codec preserves all scheduled metadata.
title: Scheduled storage codec preserves all scheduled metadata
